hero.tagline: India's most affordable 7-seater – bold, smart and modular.

overview.minides: Affordable, practical, and cleverly spacious — the Triber brings true 7-seater flexibility to everyday life.
overview.description: The 2025 Renault Triber facelift is India's most affordable 7-seater compact MPV. It features a refreshed exterior, floating 8-inch touchscreen, 7-inch TFT digital cluster (top trim), 6 airbags standard across all variants, and modular removable third-row seats. Available in 4 trim levels with a sole 72 bhp 1.0L naturally aspirated petrol engine. AMT option exclusive to the range-topping Emotion variant.
